sourceContext.originPage: capability / practice-area page - sticky section navigation

contentPattern.structure: horizontal list of label + in-page anchor links; sticky on scroll

suitableFor: sticky in-page jump navigation on long capability / landing pages
section anchor bars that highlight the section currently in view
any page needing a horizontal 'jump to section' nav on an accent band
notSuitableFor: hero headers with an image or CTA (use a hero variant)
